title: Plaid Cymru leader plans minority Welsh government built on cooperation
description: Rhun ap Iorwerth says he hopes to work with other parties and press the UK government for extra powers
content:
The leader of Plaid Cymru, Rhun ap Iorwerth, has vowed to form a stable minority government in the Senedd and said he would seek out mature cooperation from all opposition parties.
Ap Iorwerth said his administration would press the UK government for... [4280 chars]

title: Thaksin Shinawatra: Thailand's ex-PM is out of jail, but is his era over?
description: Thaksin seems incapable of taking a back seat. This time, it really could be different.
content:
For a man who spent most of the past 20 years in exile, and the past eight months in jail, the figure of former prime minister Thaksin Shinawatra still looms large over Thailand.
His release from prison at the age of 76 after serving part of a one-ye... [4530 chars]

title: Ailing Iran Nobel laureate given bail and hospital transfer
description: Iranian authorities granted human rights activist Narges Mohammadi bail amid growing concern over her poor health in prison.
content:
Iranian human rights campaigner Narges Mohammadi has been transferred from jail to a Tehran hospital amid concern over her deteriorating health.
Iranian authorities granted Mohammadi "a sentence suspension on heavy bail", a foundation run by her fami... [2238 chars]

title: Another crunch moment for Starmer as he pleads with Labour MPs not to topple him
description: The prime minister will seek to reset his premiership in a speech on Monday.
content:
It feels like the prime minister has to give the speech of his life today.
Those within the Labour Party who want to see him succeed acknowledge that you can't change everything in one speech.
But it is clearly imperative for Sir Keir Starmer to try ... [3119 chars]

title: Oil prices jump after Trump dismisses Iran proposal to end war
description: The Strait of Hormuz trade route remains effectively shut, disrupting the global energy shipments.
content:
Oil prices rose in Monday morning trade in Asia after President Donald Trump said Iran's response to US proposals to end the war was "totally unacceptable".
Tehran sent its response via Pakistan, which has served as a mediator between the two sides, ... [1167 chars]
